---
title: "Group Project"
author: Abby Cardwell and Emalee Friend
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

data <-read_excel("~/OneDrive - Oklahoma A and M System/Interpreting food and animal science research/data set for color.xlsx")

ggplot(data, aes(x = Diet, y = L, fill = Diet)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "L Values by Diet", y = "L*", x = "Diet")

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Diet, y = a, fill = Diet)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "a Values by Diet", y = "a*", x = "Diet")
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data, aes(x = Diet, y = b, fill = Diet)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "b Values by Diet", y = "b*", x = "Diet")
```
